subcodes.first_line: This is the Book which the All-Merciful hath sent down when the seat of the Throne was this manifest Station that one among the servants had raised [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الرحمن اذ کان مقر العرش هذا المقام المبین الذی بناه احد من العباد ان
